channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Cookies with InfoSec: Upgrading our Security, simplifying your login
item.description: Join our Information Security team for cookies and enrollment of Passwordless Authentication to RPI single sign on (SSO) systems on Thursday , 6/18 from 10 - 11 AM in VCC, or Wednesday, 6/24 from 2 - 3 PM in CII 3rd Floor. For more information regarding Passwordless Auth, please click above link.
item.author: Community

item.title: Final Call for Fall 2026 NRB Beyond Blocks
item.description: Through Beyond Blocks, students participate in open houses, club fairs, workshops, and social events that help them stay connected, get involved, and thrive in their new environment. Submit an event: https://surveys.rpi.edu/jfe/form/SV_ers5JWvVJ7QSmjQ Questions? Contact fye@rpi.edu
item.author: Community

item.title: Cogswell Chiller Plant Crane Operations Scheduled for June 12
item.description: On Friday, June 12, 2026, a crane will be on-site at the Cogswell Chiller Plant to remove the old North Side Cooling Towers. No parking or deliveries will be permitted in the work area for the duration of the day. The crane will be staged on the loading dock side of Cogswell Laboratory adjacent to the parking garage. Thank you for your cooperation.
item.author: Community

item.title: Division of Human Resources Professional Development Leadercamp: “Balancing Work and Life in an Always-On World” June 16, 2026 - 9AM-10AM or 12PM-1PM
item.description: In today’s always-on world, there is an expectation of constant availability, leaving little room for rest, recovery, or even a moment to think. Over time, that relentless pressure takes a real toll, burnout is often the result. Boundary expert Terri Cole explains the importance of boundaries and how to identify where they are needed, with practical strategies for protecting your energy & building a more sustainable way of working & living without sacrificing your leadership or…
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Office of Strategic Alliances and Translation - Open House
item.description:
The Office of Strategic Alliances and Translation invites you to in-person office hours on Thursday, June 11, 2026, 11:15 AM – 12:15 PM in room 2012 of the Troy building. Join us if you have questions about creating, licensing, or monetizing IP; determining if your idea has commercial potential; creating a startup or new venture; or working with industry for research or partnerships. Open to all RPI faculty and staff. No RSVP required.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
